commonQuestions.question: What is LBank?
commonQuestions.answer: Founded 2015, one of the older mid-tier exchanges. Serves 12M+ users across 210+ countries. Offices in Lithuania, Canada, Singapore. 113+ fiat currencies, 55+ payment methods. Regulated: NFA (US), Italy, Canadian MSB. Offers spot, margin, futures, ETF, grid bots, leveraged ETF (3×).

commonQuestions.question: Is LBank safe?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank is a established centralized exchange. CoinGecko trust score: 8/10 (rank #17).  Like all CEXs, funds are custodied by the exchange — use hardware wallets for long-term storage. Enable 2FA, use a strong unique password, and whitelist withdrawal addresses where available. Never share API keys.

commonQuestions.question: What is the LBank promo/referral code?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank currently uses a direct referral link via CryptoBonusWorld rather than a text code. Click the registration button on our LBank page to ensure the bonus is attributed correctly.

commonQuestions.question: How much is the LBank welcome bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Via CryptoBonusWorld, the current LBank welcome bonus is up to 500 USDT. This is a task-based reward: completing KYC, making a qualifying deposit, and reaching trading volume milestones unlocks different reward tiers. The full amount requires all milestones — most users completing a standard deposit earn a meaningful first-week reward. Bonus amounts are typically trading fee vouchers, not withdrawable cash.

commonQuestions.question: How do I claim the LBank bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Step 1: Click the registration link on the CryptoBonusWorld LBank page — the referral code/link is pre-filled. Step 2: Complete email/phone verification. Step 3: Complete KYC identity verification (required for bonuses). Step 4: Make a qualifying deposit (crypto transfer or card). Step 5: Check your Rewards Center / Bonus Hub for active tasks and complete trading volume milestones within the campaign window (usually 30 days). Vouchers are credited to your account as you complete each task tier.

commonQuestions.question: What are LBank spot trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank spot trading fees: 0.1% maker / 0.1% taker (standard).

commonQuestions.question: What are LBank futures trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank USDT-margined perpetual futures: 0.02% maker / 0.05% taker. Maximum leverage: 100×. Futures trading carries substantial risk of capital loss from liquidation. Up to 100× leverage available.

commonQuestions.question: Does LBank have P2P trading?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes, LBank offers P2P trading with escrow protection. Fee: 0% platform side. Check the exchange app for available fiat currencies and payment methods in your region.

commonQuestions.question: Does LBank have copy trading?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank does not currently offer copy trading.

commonQuestions.question: Is LBank available in the United States?
commonQuestions.answer: No. LBank restricts US residents from registering. US users should use Coinbase or Kraken as regulated alternatives.

commonQuestions.question: Is LBank available in the United Kingdom?
commonQuestions.answer: UK availability for LBank should be verified on the official website, as FCA compliance and local regulatory status may affect service availability.

commonQuestions.question: What cryptocurrencies does LBank support?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank lists 836 cryptocurrencies across 975 trading pairs. LBank regularly lists emerging altcoins alongside major assets.

commonQuestions.question: Does LBank have a mobile app?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. LBank has official iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play) apps. Download from the official LBank website (https://www.lbank.com/app or equivalent) or directly from the official app store listing to avoid counterfeit apps.

commonQuestions.question: Does LBank require KYC?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. LBank requires KYC (identity verification) to unlock full trading, withdrawals, and welcome bonus eligibility. Process: government-issued ID + selfie/liveness check. Typically completes in 2–30 minutes for automated approval; up to 24 hours for manual review.

commonQuestions.question: Does LBank have Proof of Reserves?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank does not currently publish Proof of Reserves. Use caution with large balances on any exchange without PoR.

commonQuestions.question: What leverage does LBank offer?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank offers up to 100× leverage on futures. Standard: 10–20× for most trading pairs. High leverage available — suitable only for experienced traders with strict risk management. Leverage availability varies by asset and KYC level.

commonQuestions.question: When was LBank founded and who founded it?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank was founded in 2015. Not publicly prominent.

commonQuestions.question: How many users does LBank have?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank serves 12M+ registered users across 210+ countries as of 2026.

commonQuestions.question: What is LBank's 24-hour trading volume?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank's 24-hour spot trading volume is approximately $1.70B (27 246,94 BTC) as of the last data pull (2026-06-08). This places LBank at CoinGecko rank #17 by trust-adjusted volume.

commonQuestions.question: Does LBank have a native token?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank does not have its own native exchange token.

commonQuestions.question: What is LBank's CoinGecko trust score?
commonQuestions.answer: LBank has a CoinGecko trust score of 8/10, placing it at rank #17 globally. CoinGecko's trust score assesses exchange API accuracy, trading volume legitimacy, and cybersecurity posture.
